name: Eggs and Chorizo
keywords: eggs main dish meats mexican sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the onion in oil in a 10-inch skillet until tender but not brown.
2. Add the sausage to the skillet, cooking and stirring until it is done.
3. Drain any excess fat from the sausage if necessary.
4. Mix the eggs, half-and-half, and oregano well with a fork.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the cooked sausage in the skillet.
6. Cook over medium heat. As the mixture begins to set at the bottom and sides, gently lift the cooked portion with a fork or spatula so that the uncooked egg mixture can run under the cooked portion.
7. Avoid constant stirring as this will make the eggs tough and hard.
8. Continue cooking until all the eggs are cooked but still moist, about 3 to 5 minutes.
